$comment: Manual dates for Truro Vineyards. Their /events-calendar/ page is image-only with ticketing on ExploreTock + FareHarbor (both Cloudflare-protected, no scrape). Seeded from the 2026 Wednesday Wine & Dine series flyer. Add other events here when dates appear on their site.

events.title: Wednesday Wine & Dine
events.description: Outdoor summer dinner series at Truro Vineyards. Tickets via ExploreTock.
